extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI won stage 3 sprint after STUYVEN closed down ARANBURU's late move, while MCNULTY's third-place surge protected PÖSTLBERGER's yellow jersey by shutting down time gaps.
tactical_patterns: ARANBURU launched Astana sprint too early from left side, allowing COLBRELLI to close and counter-attack successfully.
MCNULTY sacrificed pure sprint positioning to close time gaps protecting PÖSTLBERGER's 2-second GC lead before TT.
STUYVEN worked late to shut down breakaway gap despite not being designated PEDERSEN lead-out, fragmenting Trek sprint.

rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: fastest sprinter in field across three stages, finally converted superiority when team delivered proper positioning
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: outsprinted STUYVEN and KRISTOFF on uphill finish while tactically closing gaps, signals strong TT form
rider_signals.ARANBURU Alex: negative: misjudged sprint timing by going too early from left side, caught before line despite initial gap
rider_signals.PÖSTLBERGER Lukas: neutral: retained yellow by 2 seconds only because MCNULTY closed gaps, vulnerable in upcoming TT
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: pedaling squares late in sprint with teammate still present, disorganized positioning cost result
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: worked to close breakaway despite not being PEDERSEN's leadout, then still finished strong uphill
